title.ko: 기계 또는 기관, 일반 또는 용적형의 것, 예. 증기기관 (회전 피스톤 또는 진동 피스톤형 F01C; 비양변위형 F01D; 내연 기관 F02B; 연소 생성물 엔진 플랜트 F02G; 양변위형이 아닌 액체용 기계 또는 엔진 F03B; 액체로 구동되는 양변위 엔진 F03C; 풍력 모터 F03D; 액체용 양변위 기계 F04B; 회전 피스톤 또는 진동 피스톤, 액체용 양변위 기계 F04C)
title.en: MACHINES OR ENGINES, IN GENERAL OR OF POSITIVE-DISPLACEMENT TYPE, e.g. STEAM ENGINES  (of rotary-piston or oscillating-piston type F01C;of non-positive-displacement type F01D; internal-combustion engines F02B; combustion-product engine plants F02G; machines or engines, other than of positive-displacement type, for liquids F03B;  positive-displacement engines driven by liquids F03C;  wind motors F03D;  positive displacement machines for liquids F04B;  rotary-piston, or oscillating-piston, positive-displacement machines for liquids F04C)

definition.ko: 기계 및 기관 왕복운동 피스톤을 구비한 것 피스톤 수와 실린더의 배치를 특징으로 하는 것 F01B1/00 주축에 대한 실린더축의 배치를 특징으로 하는 것 F01B3/00, F01B5/00 동일 또는 동축 실린더내를 왕복운동 하는 피스톤을 특징으로 하는 것; 상기 이외의 피스톤 주축연결을 특징으로 하는 것 F01B7/00, F01B1/08; 9/00 회전주축이 없는 것을 특징으로 하는 것 F01B11/00 실린더의 회전 또는 기타 운동을 특징으로 하는 것 F01B13/00; 15/00 유니플로우 이론을 특징으로 하는 것 F01B17/00 유동적인 벽형의 용적을 구비한 것을 특징으로 하는 것 F01B19/00 기계 또는 기관의 조합 또는 응용 F01B21/00; 23/00 조절, 제어, 안전장치; 시동 F01B25/00; 27/00 기타 특징; 세부 또는 부속품 F01B29/00; 31/00

title.ko: 실린더수 또는 배치 또는 별개의 실린더 크랭크 케이스 요소의 조합을 특징으로 하는 왕복 피스톤기계 또는 기관(F01B 3/00, F01B 5/00이 우선)
title.en: Reciprocating-piston machines or engines characterised by number or relative disposition of cylinders or by being built-up from separate cylinder-crankcase elements (F01B0003000000, F01B0005000000 take precedence)
with one single cylinder
with cylinders all in one line
with cylinders in V-arrangement
with cylinders in star or fan arrangement
with cylinders arranged oppositely relative to main shaft and of "flat" type
with more than one main shaft, e.g. coupled to common output shaft
Separate cylinder-crankcase elements coupled together to form a unit
Reciprocating-piston machines or engines with cylinder axes coaxial with, or parallel or inclined to, main shaft axis
with wobble-plate
the piston motion being transmitted by curved surfaces
by multi-turn helical surfaces and automatic reversal
the helices being arranged on the pistons
Control of working-fluid admission or discharge peculiar thereto
Reciprocating-piston machines or engines with cylinder axes arranged substantially tangentially to a circle centred on main shaft axis

title.ko: 동일 실린더내 또는 본질적으로 공축의 실린더를 왕복하는 2개 이상의 피스톤을 가진 기계 또는 기관(주축에 대해서 반대방향에 배치한 것 F01B 1/08)
title.en: Machines or engines with two or more pistons reciprocating within same cylinder or within essentially coaxial cylinders (in opposite arrangement relative to main shaft F01B0001080000)
with oppositely reciprocating pistons
acting on same main shaft
using only connecting-rods for conversion of reciprocatory into rotary motion or vice versa
with side rods
having piston-rod of one piston passed through other piston
using rockers and connecting-rods
acting on different main shafts
with pistons synchronously moving in tandem arrangement
with differential piston (F01B0007200000 takes precedence)
with two or more pistons reciprocating one within another, e.g. one piston forming cylinder of the other

title.ko: 그룹 F01B1/00 ~ F01B7/00에 국한되지 않는, 피스톤과 주축 사이의 연결을 특징으로 하는 왕복 피스톤 기계 또는 기관
title.en: Reciprocating-piston machines or engines characterised by connections between pistons and main shafts, not specific to groups F01B0001000000-F01B0007000000
with crankshaft
with rotary main shaft other than crankshaft
the piston motion being transmitted by curved surfaces
with ratchet and pawl
Reciprocating-piston machines or engines without rotary main shaft, e.g. of free-piston type
Equalising or cushioning devices
Engines combined with reciprocatory driven devices, e.g. hammers
for generating vibration only
with direct fluid transmission link
Reciprocating-piston machines or engines with rotating cylinders in order to obtain the reciprocating-piston motion
with one cylinder only
with more than one cylinder
in star arrangement

title.ko: 그룹 F01B13/00에 달리 분류되지 않는 가동 실린더를 갖춘 왕복 피스톤 기계 또는 엔진
title.en: Reciprocating-piston machines or engines with movable cylinders other than provided for in group F01B0013000000

title.ko: 왕복실린더를 가지는 것(1개의 피스톤이 타의 피스톤내에 있는 것 F01B 7/20)
title.en: with reciprocating cylinders (with one piston within another F01B0007200000)
with oscillating cylinder
Control of working-fluid admission or discharge peculiar thereto
Reciprocating-piston machines or engines characterised by use of uniflow principle
Engines
Steam engines
Positive-displacement machines or engines of flexible-wall type
with plate-like flexible members
with tubular flexible members

title.ko: 2 이상의 기계 또는 엔진의 조합 (F01B23/00이 우선)
title.en: Combinations of two or more machines or engines (F01B0023000000 takes precedence)
the machines or engines being all of reciprocating-piston type
the machines or engines being not all of reciprocating-piston type, e.g. of reciprocating steam engine with steam turbine
Adaptations of machines or engines for special use; Combinations of engines with devices driven thereby
Adaptations for driving vehicles, e.g. locomotives
the vehicles being waterborne vessels
Adaptations for driving, or combinations with, hand-held tools or the like
Adaptations for driving, or combinations with, pumps
Adaptations for driving, or combinations with, electric generators
Adaptations for driving rolling mills or other heavy reversing machinery

title.ko: 조절, 제어 또는 안전 수단 (연소 엔진 제어 F02D)
title.en: Regulating, controlling or safety means (controlling combustion engines F02D)
Regulating or controlling by varying working-fluid admission or exhaust, e.g. by varying pressure or quantity
Sensing elements
responsive to speed
Final actuators
Arrangements or adaptations of working-fluid admission or discharge valves
Devices dealing with sensing elements or final actuators or transmitting means between them, e.g. power-assisted
peculiar to particular kinds of machines or engines

title.ko: 특수한 상태에 응동하는 안전장치(증기기관에 있어서 워터해머 등에 대한 것 F01B 31/34)
title.en: Safety means responsive to specific conditions (against water hammer or the like in steam engines F01B0031340000)
preventing rotation in wrong direction
Checking operation of safety devices
Braking by redirecting working fluid
thereby regenerating energy
Warning devices

title.ko: 기계 또는 기관의 시동(연소기관의 시동 F02N)
title.en: Starting of machines or engines (starting combustion engines F02N)
of reciprocating-piston engines
by directing working-fluid supply, e.g. by aid of by-pass steam conduits
specially for compound engines
Means for moving crank off dead-centre

title.ko: 메인 그룹 1/00에서 27/00으로 분류된 것 이외에 관계있는 특징을 가진 기계 또는 기관
title.en: Machines or engines with pertinent characteristics other than those provided for in main groups F01B0001000000-F01B0027000000
Atmospheric engines, i.e. atmosphere acting against vacuum
characterised by means for converting from one type to a different one
from steam engine into combustion engine
Reciprocating-piston machines or engines not otherwise provided for
Engines
Steam engines (toy steam engines A63H0025000000)
Component parts, details or accessories not provided for in, or of interest apart from, other groups
De-icing means for engines having icing phenomena
Means for equalising torque in reciprocating-piston machines or engines
Means for compensating relative expansion of component parts
Cooling of steam engines; Heating; Heat insulation
Lubricating arrangements of steam engines
Arrangements of measuring or indicating devices
Changing of compression ratio
Silencers specially adapted for steam engines
Draining
of cylinders
Idling devices, e.g. having by-passing valves
Disengagement of connections between pistons and main shafts
Other component parts, details, or accessories, peculiar to steam engines
Cylinders or cylinder covers
Arrangements of steam conduits
Arrangements or adaptations of vacuum breakers
Safety means against water hammer or against the penetration of water
automatically cutting-off steam supply
